## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] No em dashes anywhere in the diff
- [ ] No fake numbers or placeholder stats
- [ ] No `console.log` (use the logger)
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Reviewer assigned
